Stub functions for initializing, powering up, and powering down an IMU on the Asterix board.

# Purpose
This code is a C source file that provides a basic interface for initializing and managing an Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) in an embedded system. It includes header files for board configuration, various drivers, and utility functions, indicating dependencies on specific hardware components and system utilities. The function [`imu_init`](<#imu_init>) is defined but contains a comment indicating that there is no IMU on the "asterix" board, suggesting that this function is a placeholder. The functions [`imu_power_up`](<#imu_power_up>) and [`imu_power_down`](<#imu_power_down>) are defined but not yet implemented, as indicated by the "NYI" (Not Yet Implemented) comments. This file sets up the structure for future development of IMU-related functionality.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `board/board.h`
- `drivers/accel.h`
- `drivers/imu.h`
- `drivers/spi.h`
- `kernel/util/delay.h`
- `drivers/imu/bmm350/bmm350.h`
